subject: Refund request for unused month
message: I signed up 3 weeks ago but I haven't been able to use the service. I'd like a refund.
resolution: Customer was within the 30-day money-back window. Full refund of $49 processed.
agent_response: Hi Sarah, as you are within our 30-day money-back guarantee window, I have processed a full refund of $49 to your original payment method. You should see it in 5-7 business days.

subject: API rate limit questions
message: We're hitting rate limits on the API. What are the limits and can they be increased?
resolution: Explained rate limits per plan. Business plan has 5,000 req/min. Customer confirmed sufficient.
agent_response: Hi James, on your Business plan you have 5,000 requests/minute. If you need higher limits, our Enterprise plan offers custom rate limits. Let me know if you have other questions!

subject: Duplicate charge on monthly subscription
message: I was charged twice for my Pro plan this month, both charges of $49. Please refund the duplicate.
resolution: Duplicate charge confirmed. Refund of $49 issued to original payment method.
agent_response: I've confirmed you were charged twice on June 1st due to a billing system error. I've processed a refund of $49 to your card. You should see it in 5-7 business days. Apologies for the inconvenience!

subject: Cannot log in - locked out
message: My account got locked after too many failed password attempts. I need to get back in urgently.
resolution: Manual password reset triggered. Account unlocked. Customer logged in successfully.
agent_response: I can see your account is locked due to multiple failed login attempts. I've triggered a password reset email to your address right now. Please check your inbox and spam folder. The link is valid for 1 hour. Let me know once you're back in!

subject: Charged after cancellation
message: I cancelled my subscription last month and have the confirmation email but was still charged $49.
resolution: Billing error confirmed. Full refund of $49 issued. Billing team notified.
agent_response: I confirmed you cancelled on May 25th with a confirmation email. The June 1st charge was a billing error. I've immediately processed a full refund of $49. It will appear in 5-7 business days. Apologies for the inconvenience.

subject: SSO setup with Okta
message: We want to set up SSO with Okta. We're on the Business plan. How do we get started?
resolution: Sent SSO setup guide for Okta. Customer completed setup within 2 hours.
agent_response: SSO is available on your Business plan. Go to Settings > Security > SSO and follow the SAML 2.0 steps. You'll need the ACS URL and Entity ID from that page. I'm also sending our Okta-specific guide. Let me know if you need help!
